description: You are a geography teacher at a rural school setting up offline educational resources. The high-resolution 1689 van Schagen World Map (/home/ga/Documents/source_map.jpg) needs to be sliced into four equal quadrants to improve performance on student laptops. Save the quadrants to /home/ga/Documents/ with the filenames map_nw.jpg (top-left), map_ne.jpg (top-right), map_sw.jpg (bottom-left), and map_se.jpg (bottom-right). Construct an HTML file at /home/ga/Documents/map_viewer.html that uses a 2x2 table to seamlessly display these four images as a single reconstructed map without gaps.
